name: pay
description: Filecoin Pay Explorer (pnpm+turbo monorepo vendored from FilOzone/filecoin-pay-explorer). CI uses this package.json as the monorepo entrypoint: npm ci installs nothing, then npm run build bootstraps pnpm to build the real workspace.

scripts.build: corepack enable && corepack prepare pnpm@9.15.2 --activate && pnpm install --no-frozen-lockfile && pnpm --filter @filecoin-pay/types build && pnpm --filter @filecoin-pay/explorer build && rm -rf dist && cp -r apps/explorer/out dist
